extract: Blastoise (Japanese: カメックス Kamex) is a Water-type Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Wartortle starting at level 36. It is the final form of Squirtle. Blastoise has two forms: It can Mega Evolve into Mega Blastoise using the Blastoisinite. It can Gigantamax into Gigantamax Blastoise if it has the Gigantamax Factor. Gigantamax Blastoise was introduced in The Isle of Armor. Blastoise is the game mascot of Pokémon Blue Version and its Japanese counterpart, appearing on the boxart of both games.
